creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: If there is a changelog or release notes URL available for this version, please add it to the URL field.

Q/A:  Makefile: new ports should not be maintained by ports@FreeBSD.org.
 Makefile: Consider defining LICENSE.
 Makefile: "ONLY_FOR_ARCHS" has to appear earlier.
 Makefile: "USES" has to appear earlier.
 Makefile: Possible restrictive licensing found.  If there are, in fact, limitations to use or distribution, please update ports/LEGAL.
 Makefile: NO_PACKAGE is obsolete.  It should be replaced with "LICENSE_PERMS=no-pkg-mirror"

^Triage: Please confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere at least).
--
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/testing.html


Thanks!
